description:
Letter from Mūsā (or Musallaḥ?) b. Ṣāliḥ to an unknown addressee. In Hebrew and in Arabic script. Appealing for help from the addressee. (Cf. Geoffrey Khan, “The Historical Development of the Structure of Medieval Arabic Petitions,” BSOAS, 53:1 (1990), 21). EMS 
On verso long text in Judaeo-Arabic.
tags: Arabic script, communal, Arabic & Hebrew, Appeal, Petition
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
